Lightweight Vinyl & Fabric Retractable Banners with Professional Hardware PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Professional Banner Material Selection: • 13 oz Vinyl for Indoor/Outdoor Trade Shows • 14 oz No-Curl Vinyl for Premium Display Quality • Banner Soft Fabric for Vibrant Color Reproduction Complete Hardware Package: Includes Retractor Lite 47 base with double-pole support system Custom Size Options: 78" x 47" professional display format Production Time Selection: Choose 2-day express, 3-day standard, or 5-day economy PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Retractable Banner Stands for Professional Trade Show & Event Displays

The Retractor Lite 47 delivers professional-quality portable displays perfect for trade shows, retail environments, and business presentations. This lightweight banner stand system combines durability with easy transport, featuring a reliable retractor mechanism and double-pole stability for consistent performance.

Each complete system includes the Retractor Lite 47 hardware base and a custom-printed 78" x 47" banner in your choice of premium materials. Ideal for businesses requiring frequent setup and breakdown at multiple venues, this banner stand provides professional presentation quality while maintaining portability.

Choose from three professional-grade materials optimized for different display environments:

  • 13 oz Vinyl: Versatile indoor/outdoor material suitable for most trade show and retail applications
  • 14 oz No-Curl Vinyl: Premium smooth matte finish that maintains flat appearance under varying conditions
  • Banner Soft Fabric: Professional fabric construction delivering vibrant color reproduction for high-impact displays

The double-pole support system ensures stable presentation even in high-traffic environments, while the compact base design allows for easy storage and transport between events.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Stand Material for Trade Show & Indoor Display Use

Your complete banner stand package includes both the professional Retractor Lite 47 hardware and a custom 78" x 47" banner printed on your selected material.

Banner Material Options for Professional Display Quality

13 oz Vinyl: Our most versatile banner material, engineered for both indoor and outdoor applications. This durable material provides excellent print quality and weather resistance, making it ideal for trade shows that may involve outdoor setup or varying environmental conditions.

14 oz No-Curl Vinyl: Premium banner material featuring advanced formulation to prevent curling and maintain smooth presentation. The matte finish reduces glare under trade show lighting while delivering sharp, professional graphics that maintain their appearance throughout extended display periods.

Banner Soft Fabric: Professional fabric construction designed for superior color vibrancy and premium presentation quality. This material offers a sophisticated appearance ideal for upscale trade shows, corporate presentations, and retail environments where visual impact is critical.

Size Specifications: Please note that vinyl materials may experience minor size variations due to temperature sensitivity during printing and finishing processes. Our standard tolerance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. For applications requiring precise dimensions, consult with our customer service team regarding your specific display requirements.

Request a complimentary material sample packet to evaluate material quality and finish options for your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Banner Stand Assembly & Hardware Specifications

Each Retractor Lite 47 system arrives as a complete, ready-to-use display solution designed for immediate deployment at trade shows and business events.

Included Hardware Components

Retractor Lite 47 Base Unit: Lightweight yet stable aluminum construction with smooth retraction mechanism designed for frequent use. The compact base footprint maximizes display area while minimizing floor space requirements.

Double-Pole Support System: Enhanced stability configuration featuring dual support poles that prevent banner movement and ensure professional presentation even in high-traffic environments or areas with air circulation.

Banner Attachment System: Professional-grade mounting hardware that securely connects your custom banner to the retractor mechanism, allowing for easy banner replacement when updating graphics or seasonal messaging.

Setup & Portability Features

Tool-free assembly allows setup in under 60 seconds, making this system ideal for frequent exhibitors and businesses requiring quick display changes. The lightweight construction facilitates easy transport between venues while maintaining professional stability during use.

Compact storage design fits standard trade show shipping cases and vehicle transport, reducing logistics complexity for multi-location businesses and traveling sales teams.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Retractable Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production scheduling to accommodate your trade show deadlines and business timeline requirements. Choose from express, standard, or economy production options based on your specific needs.

Express & Standard Production Time Options

2-Day Express Production: Ideal for urgent trade show requirements or last-minute display needs. Perfect when you have limited time but need professional-quality results for important business events.

  • Complete production within 2 business days of artwork approval
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Same-day emergency service available in select situations
  • Production time excludes shipping duration to your location

3-Day Standard Production for Most Banner Orders

3-Day Standard Production: Our most popular option, providing the optimal balance of speed and value. This timeframe accommodates most trade show planning schedules while maintaining competitive pricing.

  • Complimentary standard production timing
  • Sufficient time for careful quality control and finishing
  • Ideal for most business event planning timelines
  • Compatible with standard shipping methods for most delivery requirements

5-Day Economy Production for Budget-Conscious Projects

5-Day Economy Production: Cost-effective option for projects with flexible deadlines, allowing additional savings while maintaining full quality standards.

  • Maximum cost savings for budget-conscious orders
  • Full quality control and professional finishing included
  • Ideal for seasonal displays and planned promotional campaigns
  • Compatible with economy shipping options for additional savings

Production Timeline Notes: Production time begins once file upload is complete and artwork passes prepress review. Orders requiring proofs begin production timing from approval confirmation. Emergency rush service may be available for critical deadlines - contact customer service for availability.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Banner Payment & Ordering Options

All custom banner stands require payment confirmation before entering production to ensure your order processes according to your selected timeline.

Accepted Payment Methods

Credit Card Processing: We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover. Your card will only be charged after you approve your final order details and artwork.

Check Payments: Business checks are accepted and must be received and cleared before production begins. This payment method may extend your total project timeline to account for processing and verification time.

For detailed information about check payment procedures and processing times, review our complete check payment guidelines.

Order Processing & Approval

Your payment method will not be charged until you have reviewed and approved all order specifications, including artwork, materials, production timing, and shipping details. This approval-based system ensures complete accuracy before production begins.

Large volume orders or repeat customer accounts may qualify for alternative payment arrangements. Contact our customer service team to discuss options for ongoing banner stand needs or corporate account setup.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Retractable Banner Delivery

Professional packaging and reliable delivery ensure your banner stands arrive ready for immediate use at your trade show or business location.

Professional Packaging & Delivery Guidelines

Tracking Information: You will receive complete tracking details once your banner stand ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress and plan for arrival at your specified location.

Shipping Cost Structure: Rates are calculated based on package weight and delivery destination. Large or multiple banner stand orders may incur additional shipping charges due to dimensional requirements.

Carrier Responsibility: Once shipped, all carrier terms and policies apply for delivery timing and package handling. We cannot provide refunds for carrier delays or issues beyond our control, including weather-related delays or natural disasters.

Damage Protection: If your banner stand arrives damaged, return all damaged components and we will send replacement products. For lost packages, replacements are provided after carrier confirms loss, typically 7-10 business days post-delivery date.

For specific shipping questions or special delivery requirements, contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

Express & Standard Shipping Methods Available

Available Shipping Options:

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days, cost-effective for flexible delivery timelines
  • Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days, most popular option for typical trade show planning
  • Three-Day Shipping: 3 business days, reliable mid-speed option
  • Two-Day Shipping: 2 business days, expedited delivery for tight schedules
  • Overnight Shipping: Next business day, fastest available option for urgent needs

Economy Shipping Notes: When selecting economy shipping, include complete address details including P.O. Box information in the "Address Two" field to ensure successful delivery.

International Shipping: Available through USPS and UPS with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation. Contact customer service for international shipping procedures and requirements.

Visit our complete shipping information page for detailed delivery timeframes and policies.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show Installation & Setup Instructions for Banner Stands

The Retractor Lite 47 system is designed for versatile use across multiple business and promotional environments, providing professional display quality with easy setup and transport.

Primary Applications for Retractable Banner Stands

Trade Show Exhibitions: Ideal for booth displays, product showcases, and corporate presentations. The lightweight design facilitates easy transport between shows while the professional appearance enhances brand presentation quality.

Retail Environments: Perfect for seasonal promotions, product launches, and in-store advertising. Quick setup allows for frequent message changes and promotional updates without requiring permanent installation.

Business Presentations: Professional appearance suitable for client meetings, corporate events, and sales presentations. The stable base ensures consistent display quality in various venue types.

Event Marketing: Suitable for conferences, seminars, and networking events where portable professional displays enhance brand visibility and message delivery.

Setup & Installation Advantages

Tool-Free Assembly: Complete setup in under 60 seconds without requiring tools or technical expertise, making it ideal for frequent use by sales teams and marketing staff.

Venue Flexibility: Compact footprint works in limited space situations while providing maximum visual impact. Suitable for both indoor and covered outdoor applications.

Transport Efficiency: Lightweight construction and compact storage design reduce shipping costs and simplify logistics for businesses participating in multiple events or maintaining displays at various locations.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Artwork Requirements for Custom Retractable Banner Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and professional appearance for your retractable banner display.

Professional Design Guidelines for Banner Stand Artwork

Recommended File Formats: Vector-based files such as .eps with fonts converted to outlines provide the highest print quality. High-resolution .pdf or .jpg files (typically 300 dpi or higher) are also acceptable for most applications.

File Size Requirements: Upload files up to 60 MB through our standard system. For larger files, contact customer service for alternative upload instructions to ensure fastest processing.

Quality Assurance: If you're uncertain about your artwork quality or resolution, our professional graphic design team can review and optimize your files to ensure optimal print results.

Order Approval & Proof Options for Banner Stands

Order Proof Service: Request a comprehensive proof to verify all order details before production. Your proof includes low-resolution artwork preview, complete order summary with pricing, and billing/shipping information confirmation.

Proof Approval Process: Orders requesting proofs will not enter production until you provide written approval, ensuring complete accuracy for your final banner stand.

Color Matching Services for Brand-Critical Displays

Color Match Proof System: For projects requiring precise color matching, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color verification method. This service is particularly valuable for corporate displays requiring exact brand color reproduction.

Contact a customer service representative to discuss Color Match Proof System options and ensure your banner stand meets specific brand color requirements.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Retractable Banner Stands for Your Next Event

Ready to create professional displays that enhance your brand presence at trade shows and business events? Our Retractor Lite 47 system combines professional quality with portable convenience, delivering the visual impact you need to stand out from the competition.

Complete Display Solution: Each order includes both professional hardware and custom-printed banner, eliminating the need for separate component purchases. Choose from three premium materials designed for different display environments and quality requirements.

Flexible Production Scheduling: Select from 2-day express, 3-day standard, or 5-day economy production to match your event timeline and budget requirements. Professional quality is maintained across all production speed options.

Professional Support: Our in-house customer service team includes graphic design professionals ready to assist with artwork optimization, material selection, and technical specifications to ensure your banner stand exceeds expectations.

Proven Reliability: Used by thousands of businesses for trade shows, retail displays, and corporate presentations. The Retractor Lite 47 delivers consistent performance and professional appearance event after event.

Transform your next trade show or business presentation with a custom retractable banner stand designed to showcase your brand professionally. Upload your artwork or select from our template collection to begin creating your custom display solution.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractable Banner Stands

What's included with my Retractor Lite 47 order?

Each complete system includes the Retractor Lite 47 hardware base with double-pole support system and a custom-printed 78" x 47" banner in your selected material. Everything needed for immediate display setup is included.

How quickly can my retractable banner be produced?

Choose from 2-day express, 3-day standard, or 5-day economy production options. Production time begins after artwork approval and excludes shipping time to your location.

What banner materials work best for trade shows?

All three materials are suitable for trade show use. 13 oz vinyl offers versatility for indoor/outdoor, 14 oz no-curl vinyl provides premium appearance with matte finish, and banner soft fabric delivers maximum color vibrancy for high-impact displays.

How portable is the Retractor Lite 47 system?

The lightweight aluminum construction and compact design make transport easy between venues. Setup requires under 60 seconds with no tools needed, ideal for frequent exhibitors and traveling sales teams.

Can I replace the banner without purchasing new hardware?

Yes, the professional mounting system allows for easy banner replacement, making it cost-effective to update graphics for different events or seasonal messaging while reusing the hardware base.

What artwork specifications ensure best print quality?

Vector-based files (.eps with outlined fonts) provide optimal results. High-resolution .pdf or .jpg files at 300 dpi or higher also work well. Our design team can assist with artwork optimization if needed.

Do you offer color matching for brand-critical displays?

Yes, our Color Match Proof System provides precise color verification for corporate displays requiring exact brand color reproduction. Contact customer service for details about this specialized service.

What shipping options are available for banner stands?

We offer economy (5-10 days), standard (3-5 days), three-day, two-day, and overnight shipping options. All shipments include tracking information and professional packaging to ensure safe delivery.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
